dashboard.title: Media Manager
dashboard.subtitle: Library health and composition at a glance. Scan, identify, and organise your media.
dashboard.error: Could not load the Media Manager dashboard.
dashboard.scanStartedBody_one: Scanning {{count}} library in the background — progress shows on the Libraries page.
dashboard.scanStartedBody_other: Scanning {{count}} libraries in the background — progress shows on the Libraries page.
dashboard.noLibrariesBody: Add a library to point Media Manager at a folder and start scanning.

libraries.title: Libraries
libraries.subtitle: Point Media Manager at folders to scan, identify, and organise. Each library carries its own preset and naming template.
libraries.emptyBody: Define a library to map a media kind to a folder and naming template.

scanProgress.title: Scanning “{{name}}”
scanProgress.running: Scanning in progress — you can hide this and it keeps running.
scanProgress.waiting: Waiting for the scanner to start…

libraries.deleteConfirm: Delete library "{{name}}"? Scanned items for this library are removed too.
libraries.invalidIntervalBody: Enter a non-negative number of minutes, or leave it blank.

dialog.description: Maps a media kind to a folder, naming template, and scan schedule.

field.name: Name
field.templatePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the preset default

items.title: Media Items
items.subtitle: Everything Media Manager has scanned. Re-identify to re-run automatic matching, or unmatch to clear a bad identity.

series.emptyBody: No TV shows match these filters.

items.emptyFilteredBody: Try clearing a filter, or scan a library to add items.
items.emptyBody: Scan a library to populate this list.

unmatched.title: Unmatched Items
unmatched.subtitle: Items automatic identification could not confidently match. Re-run identification or match them manually.
unmatched.emptyBody: Every scanned item has been matched. Nice.

dialog.title: Match manually
dialog.description: Provide the correct identity for this item, or pick an IMDb suggestion below.

imdb.heading: IMDb suggestions
imdb.enterTitle: Enter a title above to see IMDb suggestions.
imdb.noMatchesBody: Adjust the title, year, or type to refine the search.

duplicates.title: Duplicates
duplicates.subtitle: Groups of items that look like duplicates. The highest-quality item is suggested to keep.
duplicates.emptyBody: Run detection to scan your libraries for duplicate items.
duplicates.footnote: Selecting a keeper marks the rest as removal candidates. Remove files from disk via the rename engine or your media server.

renamePreview.title: Rename Preview
renamePreview.subtitle: Preview how a source folder would be reorganized into a library’s layout, then execute when it looks right.
renamePreview.dryRunHint: Turn off “Dry run” to enable Execute.
renamePreview.pickFirst: Pick a library and a source path first.
renamePreview.confirmExecute: Execute this rename plan on disk?

settings.title: Media Settings
settings.subtitle: Metadata providers, artwork and subtitle preferences, rename templates, and media-server integrations.

imdb.title: IMDb provider
imdb.description: Configure IMDb metadata from user-provided datasets or a licensed IMDb API.
imdb.body: Dataset import, official-API configuration, and matching preferences for the IMDb provider.

metadata.title: Metadata providers
metadata.description: TMDB powers rich metadata and artwork. Without a key, local NFO metadata is used.
metadata.noViewPerm: You do not have permission to view settings. Ask an administrator to configure the TMDB API key.

artworkPref.title: Artwork preferences
artworkPref.description: Which artwork type to prefer when multiple are available.
artworkPref.label: Preferred artwork type

subtitlePref.title: Subtitle preferences
subtitlePref.description: Preferred subtitle languages (comma-separated ISO codes), used to flag missing subtitles.
subtitlePref.label: Preferred languages

renameTemplates.title: Rename templates
renameTemplates.description: Naming templates are configured per library and in the rename engine.

cleanup.title: Cleanup rules
cleanup.description: Erase junk files (and unwanted-language subtitles) before moving the important files during a rename/move.
cleanup.enabledHint: Only applies to the Rename in place and Move modes — never to copy/hardlink/symlink, where the source is your seeding copy.
cleanup.globsHint: One filename pattern per line (or comma-separated). Wildcards: * (any run), ? (one character). A video file is never deleted even if a pattern matches it.
cleanup.langsHint: ISO-639 codes to keep (e.g. en, es). Subtitles in other languages are deleted; untagged subtitles are always kept. Leave blank to keep every subtitle.
cleanup.pruneLabel: Remove the source folder if it's left empty
cleanup.removeTorrentLabel: Delete a leftover .torrent in the source folder

integrations.noPermBody: You do not have permission to manage media-server integrations.
integrations.title: Media Server Integrations
integrations.description: Connect Plex, Jellyfin, Emby, or Kodi to trigger library refreshes.
integrations.emptyBody: Add a media-server integration to keep your server’s library in sync.

dialog.description: Secrets are encrypted at rest and never shown again. Leave the {{token}} blank to keep the existing one.

renamer.title: Media renamer
renamer.subtitle: Organize downloads into media-server layouts. Hardlink and symlink modes keep torrents seeding.

tokensHelp.title: Available template variables
tokensHelp.padding: zero-pad numbers to a fixed width (e.g. 01, 005)
tokensHelp.optional: optional block — shown only when the token has a value

desc.episodeEnd: Last episode number for a multi-episode file

libraries.emptyBody: Define a library to map a media kind to a destination path and naming template.

dialog.description: Maps a media kind to a destination path and naming template.

field.name: Name
field.templatePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the preset default

rename.hint: Preview is a safe dry-run. Hardlink and symlink modes keep the torrent seeding.
rename.missingFieldsBody: A source path and a destination library path are required.
rename.confirmApply: Apply this rename plan to disk?

history.emptyBody: Applied rename operations are recorded here.

dryRun.pathsHint: One file per line. Subtitles, samples and extras are detected automatically.
dryRun.sourceRequiredBody: Enter the release / source name to parse.
dryRun.noFilesBody: Add at least one file path (one per line).
dryRun.nothingBody: No file operations were planned for this source.

jobs.emptyBody: Run a dry run and execute it to create your first job.

jobDetail.title: Job detail
jobDetail.heading: Rename job
jobDetail.description: File-by-file outcome of this rename job.
jobDetail.noFiles: No files recorded for this job.
jobDetail.rollbackConfirm: Roll back all file operations for this job?

templates.emptyBody: Add a naming template to override the built-in presets.

templateDialog.description: Tokens like {title}, {year}, {season}, {episode} are expanded at rename time.
templateDialog.name: Name

detail.error: Could not load this media item.

imdb.heading: IMDb
imdb.notLinked: This item is not linked to an IMDb title
imdb.notLinkedCta: — use “Match with IMDb” to search and link one.

dialog.title: Match with IMDb
dialog.description: Search the IMDb provider and pick the correct title to link this item.

imdb.prompt: Enter a title and search to see IMDb suggestions.
imdb.noResultsBody: No IMDb titles matched. Try adjusting the title, year, or type.

files.emptyBody: This item has no scanned files yet.

artwork.importedNone: No artwork imported — configure a TMDB key and match this item first.
artwork.emptyBody: Fetch metadata or upload custom artwork to populate this item.

subtitles.emptyBody: Scan to discover sidecar subtitle files next to this item.

rename.description: Preview how this item would be renamed using its library’s preset and template.
rename.noLibrary: This item is not associated with a library.
rename.noLibraryError: This item has no library configured.

nfo.description: Generate a Kodi-style .nfo sidecar for this item from its metadata.
nfo.emptyBody: No .nfo sidecar files have been generated for this item yet.

history.emptyBody: Applied rename operations are recorded here.
history.noMatch: No operations matched this item — showing recent activity.

acquisition.title: Media Acquisition
acquisition.subtitle: Intelligent watchlists, quality profiles and explainable download decisions with an approval workflow.

overview.emptyBody: Evaluations will appear here as releases are scored against your profiles.

watchlist.emptyBody: Add a series, movie or anime to start tracking wanted releases.

dialog.description: Track a series, movie or anime so matching releases are evaluated automatically.
dialog.title: Title
dialog.imdbIdHint: Optional. Required to scan this series for missing episodes (e.g. tt0903747).
dialog.rssRuleHint: Optionally use an RSS rule's match preferences to decide auto-downloads for this show; otherwise the global Auto-Download preferences apply.

missingEpisodes.title: Missing Episodes
missingEpisodes.subtitle: Find episodes of your monitored series that aren't in your library yet, using the local IMDb catalogue.
missingEpisodes.staleNote: Computed from the local IMDb mirror ({{date}}). Very recent episodes may not appear until the mirror updates.

empty.title: No monitored series
empty.body: Add a series to your watchlist with an IMDb ID to track its missing episodes.

missingEpisodes.notMonitorable: No IMDb ID — edit this watchlist item and add one to enable scanning.
missingEpisodes.neverScanned: Not scanned yet — run a scan to compute missing episodes.
missingEpisodes.noEpisodes: No episodes found in the IMDb catalogue for this series.
missingEpisodes.confirmRemove: Remove “{{title}}” from the Missing Episodes watchlist? Tracking for this show will stop.
missingEpisodes.removeFailed: Could not remove the show from the watchlist

simulator.title: Decision Simulator
simulator.subtitle: Paste a release name to see exactly what Smart Download would decide — and why — without downloading anything.

dashboard.title: Smart Download
dashboard.subtitle: At-a-glance acquisition decisions, queues and library gaps.
dashboard.emptyWaiting: Nothing is waiting for a better release.

profiles.emptyBody: Create a profile to define how releases are scored and approved.

dialog.description: Define quality preferences and the score thresholds that drive download and approval decisions.
dialog.name: Name
dialog.termPlaceholder: Type a term and press Enter
dialog.maxSizeHint: A profile outranks the global defaults, so their size cap no longer applies once this profile matches. Leave blank for no limit.
dialog.maxSizeSuspect: larger than any single episode. Did you mean GB?

evaluations.emptyBody: Evaluate a release above or wait for RSS items to be scored.

toast.releaseRequiredBody: Enter a release name to evaluate.

detail.title: Evaluation detail
detail.description: Full decision trace and library context.

approvals.error: Could not load the approval queue.
approvals.emptyBody: Releases that require a human decision will appear here.

rejectDialog.title: Reject release
rejectDialog.placeholder: Why is this release being rejected?

history.emptyBody: Acquisition events will be recorded here as decisions are made.

settings.autoEvaluateHint: Score incoming RSS releases against profiles automatically.
settings.notifyHint: Send a notification whenever a release needs a human decision.
settings.autoSearchMissingHint: On a schedule, search your indexers for each monitored show's missing episodes and grab matches per your auto-download preferences.
settings.exportHint: Download evaluations, watchlist and profiles as a JSON file.

librarySeries.title: Add series from your libraries
librarySeries.subtitle: Select shows to monitor for missing episodes. Series already in your libraries are listed with their IMDb IDs resolved automatically.
librarySeries.empty: No series found in your libraries.

autoDownload.intro: Ranked auto-download preferences: the missing-episode sweep grabs the first release that matches (quality + size cap), top to bottom. Used when a show isn't linked to an RSS rule.
autoDownload.emptyBody: Add a preference to control which releases auto-download.
autoDownload.dialogDescription: A release must match this candidate's quality and stay within its size limits to be grabbed.
autoDownload.name: Name

dupes.title: Duplicate show folders
dupes.subtitle: Two folders that are really the same show. Pick the real path — the rest are re-homed into it and removed.
dupes.loadError: Could not check for duplicate show folders.
dupes.emptyHint: Every show in your libraries lives in exactly one folder.
dupes.reviewHint: These folders were tied together only by a shared IMDb id, and their names do not match — a single mis-tagged episode is enough to do that. Check they really are the same show before merging.
dupes.pickReal: Which folder is the real one? Everything else is moved into it.
dupes.previewFailed: Could not build the merge preview
dupes.previewDesc: Everything will be re-homed into {{path}}. Nothing has happened yet.
dupes.keepsLarger: keeps the larger file; the smaller goes to Trash
dupes.merged: Merged — {{moved}} moved, {{trashed}} to Trash, {{deleted}} folder(s) deleted
